content:
🚨 Cyber Fraud Alert: When the Hope of Recovering Money Leads to Even Bigger Losses 🚨

Recently, I handled a heartbreaking cyber fraud case involving a young professional from Bengaluru who became the victim of an online gaming and investment scam.

Like many victims, he initially believed he could recover his losses. The fraudulent platform kept encouraging him to deposit more money with promises of multiplying his investment. Believing he was only one step away from recovering everything, he continued investing.

Unfortunately, the consequences were devastating.

He exhausted his entire savings, borrowed money from relatives and friends, took a salary advance and loan from his employer, and even approached multiple banks for personal loans. Every rupee he could arrange was deposited into the platform, believing that the next withdrawal would recover all his losses.

The platform involved was BC Game, which claimed users could earn significant returns. Instead, it became the reason he lost everything.
6 arrests and freezing of several bank accounts connected to the transactions.

As a result, my client's bank account was also frozen during the investigation, despite him being a victim.

Our Legal Action

✅ Filed a complaint with the South Division Cyber Crime Police Station, Bengaluru.

✅ Personally approached the investigating authorities and submitted a detailed written complaint with supporting evidence.

✅ Ensured that all financial transactions were properly documented and reported.

✅ Initiated the process of filing a Property Registration Application under Section 497 of the Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS) to establish my client's legitimate claim over the frozen funds and seek lawful recovery.

The legal process is currently underway.

Important Lessons for Everyone

🔹 If an online platform promises unrealistic returns, treat it as a red flag.

🔹 Never borrow money to recover losses from an online gaming or investment platform.

🔹 The longer you continue investing after being defrauded, the greater your financial exposure becomes.

🔹 Report cyber fraud immediately. Delay can complicate investigations and reduce the chances of recovery.

🔹 Preserve every transaction record, screenshot, bank statement, and communication.

🔹 Consult an experienced cybercrime lawyer at the earliest stage. Timely legal intervention can make a significant difference in protecting your rights and pursuing recovery.

Every cyber fraud victim deserves legal guidance—not judgment.

Don't suffer in silence. Act quickly.

Adv. Sunita Sharma
Cyber Crime & Financial Fraud Matters
📞 +91 70119 601609
